propositions: FAIL completion verdicts surface no guidance directing callers to the legitimate evidence channel of recording completion evidence as ticket comments.
reconcile_verdict should set a non-empty remediation string on every FAIL verdict (both agentic and deterministic child-closure) while leaving PASS verdicts without one.
The remediation guidance must be generic and coach callers to document evidence (file paths, commands and output, links, reasoning) as ticket comments read on the next verification.
The guidance must retain the finish-then-reverify route and must not reference forcing a ticket closed.
A blocked close and the verify-completion text output must surface the remediation guidance on a FAIL verdict.
